allow: PowerShell($url = "https://tessdata.projectnaptha.com/4.0.0/eng.traineddata.gz"; $dest = "F:\\SISTEMAS\\xd\\ACADEMIA\\academia-app\\src\\assets\\tessdata\\eng.traineddata.gz"; Write-Host "Downloading eng.traineddata.gz \(~1.8MB\)..."; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $dest -UseBasicParsing; $size = \(Get-Item $dest\).Length / 1KB; Write-Host "Done: $\([math]::Round\($size\)\) KB")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); free_vision=[m['id'] for m in data['data'] if ':free' in m['id'] and 'image' in m.get\('architecture',{}\).get\('input_modalities',[]\)]  ; print\('\\n'.join\(free_vision\)\)")
